items.title: Hollander POTD Clark Kellogg. Ohio St F was drafted 8th overall in 82. Had 20 ppg 10 rpg as rookie. Very good thru 85 when he hurt knee and was never the same. Retired after 86-87 when knee didn't improve. TV guy since 90. Noted in multiple bios to be good at Ms Pacman.

items.title: The Jaylen Brown trade is the 1st time in NBA history that a team has traded away a player who was with them for 10+ years, won a title with them and finished better than 10th in the most recent MVP voting
items.author: Mike Lynch
items.body_excerpt:
The Jaylen Brown trade is the 1st time in NBA history that a team has traded away a player who was with them for 10+ years, won a title with them and finished better than 10th in the most recent MVP voting

The only other instance where a player received MVP votes was Scottie Pippen (10th in 1998)

items.title: My friend Jessie made an observation about the consensus GOAT episode of Frasier, Ham Radio, I never picked up on in decades of watching it.
items.author: Chris Hine
items.body_excerpt:
My friend Jessie made an observation about the consensus GOAT episode of Frasier, Ham Radio, I never picked up on in decades of watching it. 

Frasier hires a voice actor named Mel White to do multiple voices in the radio play. 

White = Blanc in French. Mel Blanc did all the Looney Tunes voices.

items.title: [Haberstroh] The truth is that in the last four seasons, the Celtics without Jaylen Brown went a sizzling 47-10 (.825), which is the equivalent of being a 68-win team. That's not analytics. That's just counting wins and losses for a team without a certain player.
